title: 24 Pcs Glitter Roses Bouquet,Artificial Rose Bouquet,Sparkly Rose,DIY Fake Glitter Bouquets with Crown Card 3D Butterfly for Birthday Gifts Wedding Valentine's Day Mother's Day (Blue)
features: Complete Rose Bouquet Set: Sparkling rose bouquet includes 24 artificial roses, crown, greeting card, heart clip, gold leaves, 32 cm flower stems, wrapping paper, paper cut butterfly gold ribbon, tape, transparent gloves, etc.; you can bring your family, loved ones and friends unlimited joy with your own handmade rose bouquet

Shiny And Romantic Design: Each rose in artificial roses is made from high quality materials that are durable and ensure that the flowers will never wilt or fade. The flowers also have a delicate layer of glitter on the petals to add a touch of elegance and glamour, the glitter effect enhances the beauty of each flower and makes them perfect for romantic occasions (glitter will fall off slightly, this is normal)

DIY Artificial Glitter Bouquets: flexible stems are easy to bend and arrange, suitable for any vase or bouquet style; Create your own unique flower arrangements with DIY Glitter Rose Bouquets, and fill your home or event decor with endless creativity and beauty

Best Gift: Sparkly rose bouquet is full of unique, beautiful and mysterious flavour, it is the ideal gift for every important occasion for the dearest person in your life.Forever Bouquet is the perfect gift for Mother's Day, Valentine's Day, Christmas, Thanksgiving Day, anniversaries, graduations, birthdays, engagements, weddings and more

Versatile Use: Not only do glitter flowers make a timeless gift, they can also be used as an elegant decoration that stays fresh all year round; whether as a symbol of appreciation, a sign of love, or a display of holiday cheer, these glitter rose bouquets are sure to bring a big smile to the faces of the people you love, and make for a meaningful and unforgettable gift
